subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! That which thou hadst written was perused. In truth, thou art right [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان آنچه مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید فی الحقیقه حق با شماست
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @contention and conflict
